query: SELECT id, subject, newsletter_type, send_date, recipientCount, sent_count FROM newsletter_sends WHERE send_date IN ('2026-05-13', '2026-05-14') ORDER BY send_date ASC, id ASC LIMIT 20;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3aGZ9MSLrhgSbtV.0a4dfe1f8b2a --database UyPaon6i3Ec4nvfPz6kUfg --execute SELECT id, subject, newsletter_type, send_date, recipientCount, sent_count FROM newsletter_sends WHERE send_date IN ('2026-05-13', '2026-05-14') ORDER BY send_date ASC, id ASC LIMIT 20;
